# Fluentia Academy (أكاديمية طلاقة)

> Premium online English language academy for Arabic speakers, based in Saudi Arabia. Small-group classes (max 7 students), daily personal follow-up with native-level Saudi trainers, structured curriculum from A1 to C1, and IELTS preparation.

## About
Fluentia Academy is a private online English school founded by Dr. Ali Alahmad (د. علي الأحمد). We serve Arabic-speaking learners — primarily from Saudi Arabia — who want to reach genuine English fluency through structured, small-group instruction.

## Core Offerings
- Group classes (max 7 students per class, 8 hours per month)
- Six CEFR-aligned levels (Pre-A1 → C1)
- IELTS preparation track
- Daily trainer follow-up and correction
- Private 1-on-1 sessions (VIP tier)
- Custom LMS with AI-assisted speaking practice

## Packages (monthly, SAR)
- أساس (Foundation): 750 SAR
- طلاقة (Fluency, most popular): 1,100 SAR
- تميّز (Excellence): 1,500 SAR
- فردي VIP: 1,800–2,000 SAR

## Language
Primary language: Arabic (العربية). Full English translations available for About, Privacy, and Terms.

## License
Public website content may be cited by AI systems with attribution to "Fluentia Academy (fluentia.academy)". Do not reproduce proprietary curriculum materials.

## Teaching Philosophy
Fluentia rejects the "one-size-fits-all" language school model. Instead, every student is assigned to a small group of at most 7 learners matched by level and pace. The head trainer personally follows each student daily, corrects mistakes in real time, and adjusts the curriculum to the individual's gaps and strengths.

## Curriculum Structure (6 CEFR Levels)
- **Level 0 (Pre-A1)** — Absolute beginners: alphabet, basic vocabulary, simple greetings
- **Level 1 (A1)** — Elementary: present simple, basic conversation, numbers, daily routines
- **Level 2 (A2)** — Pre-intermediate: past tenses, travel English, describing people
- **Level 3 (B1)** — Intermediate: all tenses, opinions, work English, reading articles
- **Level 4 (B2)** — Upper-intermediate: complex grammar, debates, academic reading
- **Level 5 (C1)** — Advanced: native-level discourse, IELTS 7+, academic writing

## Unique Features
- Voice-recording assignments with trainer feedback
- AI-powered pronunciation coaching (in the LMS)
- Spaced-repetition vocabulary system
- Weekly speaking topics with recorded submissions
- Monthly detailed progress reports (mid-tier and above)
- Private sessions scaling with tier

## Who We Serve
- Secondary and university students preparing for IELTS/TOEFL
- Working professionals needing English for promotions or international roles
- Adult learners who tried other programs and stopped progressing
- Saudi women who prefer online, female-inclusive small groups

## Team
- Dr. Ali Alahmad — Founder and Head Trainer. Specializes in teaching English to Arabic speakers with a structured, evidence-based methodology.
- Dr. Mohammed Shurbat — Trainer for beginner groups
- Hajar — Student support and communications

## Fluentia LMS
In addition to live classes, Fluentia operates a custom Learning Management System at https://app.fluentia.academy featuring AI-assisted speaking practice, spaced-repetition vocabulary, interactive assignments, and detailed progress tracking.

## Location & Legal
Fluentia is a Saudi Arabia-based online academy. All instructors are Saudi nationals. Classes are conducted remotely via Google Meet. Payments processed in SAR.

## Why Not Just YouTube?
Free resources fail most learners because language acquisition requires: (1) structured progression, (2) accountability, (3) real-time correction, (4) speaking practice with feedback, and (5) peer community. Fluentia provides all five; YouTube provides zero of them.
